overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character walks from a street into a covered colonnade, then along busy sidewalks with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, finally ascending to an upper plaza with palm trees overlooking the sprawling metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street approaching corporate building entrance

events.description: approaching the entrance to the Ellison building colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street toward the Ellison building entrance, passing pedestrians and a parked yellow sports car

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow pants walking in the opposite direction
yellow sports car parked at the curb

entered.detail: large corporate building with stone facade and prominent entrance
bright yellow futuristic sports car parked on the street
glowing advertisement screen mounted on building facade
zebra crossing with red and yellow painted stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city street at night, approaching the entrance to the Ellison building. A yellow sports car is parked on the right while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side of the street as the camera moves toward the building's colonnade entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway under Ellison building

events.description: entering the covered colonnade of the Ellison building
ambient light shifts from neon street lighting to dimmer artificial ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway beneath the Ellison building, passing between large concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead in the colonnade

entered.detail: covered walkway with massive rectangular concrete pillars and overhead structure
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling of the colonnade
illuminated red and white sign reading 'Ellison' above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered colonnade of the Ellison building, transitioning from the bright neon street to a dimly lit sheltered walkway with concrete pillars. Linear ceiling lights provide artificial illumination while neon signs from the outside city are visible through the openings on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with corporate advertisements

events.description: exiting the colonnade back into the open neon-lit street
returning to bright neon lighting from the dark colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk surrounded by crowds, with towering neon-lit skyscrapers on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking alongside the camera
futuristic car driving past on the street below the railings

entered.detail: large green neon sign with arrow reading 'ORBITAL AIR' mounted on building
red circular neon corporate logo high on skyscraper facade
bright orange safety railings separating sidewalk from street level
yellow and black striped construction barriers along the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the colonnade, the scene opens into a vibrant neon-lit street dominated by the green ORBITAL AIR sign and red Arasaka corporate logos on towering skyscrapers. The sidewalk is crowded with pedestrians walking in the same direction, separated from the street by orange railings and construction barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street approaching elevated plaza entrance

events.description: beginning to ascend concrete stairs leading to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street past modern glass buildings, then beginning to climb stairs to an upper level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated cyan window strips and glass facade
wide concrete staircase with integrated lighting leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the street with a modern glass tower rising on the left. The crowd density remains moderate as the camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. The ORBITAL AIR sign recedes into the distance while the street barriers and railings pass out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with palm trees overlooking city skyline

events.description: reaching the top of stairs and entering the open upper plaza
finishing ascent and beginning to walk across the plaza while panning to view the skyline

agents.ego_description: climbing the final steps to the upper plaza, then walking across the open terrace with palm trees while observing the city view

entered.detail: elevated open terrace with tiled flooring overlooking the city
large round concrete planters containing palm trees
tall palm trees with uplighting in circular planters
panoramic view of the neon-lit downtown skyscrapers from elevated vantage point

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the upper plaza, an elevated open terrace with palm trees in circular planters. The space offers a panoramic view of the neon-drenched city skyline. The camera walks across the tiled plaza surface, passing the illuminated palm trees while the dense urban core spreads out in the distance below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city street through a sheltered architectural passage and back into a vibrant, neon-drenched corporate district. It begins on a wet nighttime road, passing a parked yellow sports car and pedestrians under the glow of large digital billboards while moving toward the entrance of the Ellison building. As the camera enters the building's colonnade, the bright city lights fade into a dimly lit walkway defined by concrete pillars and linear ceiling lights, though neon flickers remain visible through the side openings. The scene then opens back into the open air, shifting from the sheltered concrete to a crowded sidewalk bordered by orange construction railings. Finally, the view expands to reveal a towering cityscape dominated by the green Orbital Air sign and red Arasaka logos against the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a bustling city street up to an elevated urban terrace overlooking a neon skyline. It begins by moving along a street beside a modern glass tower, passing through a moderate crowd as the camera approaches a wide concrete staircase. As the camera climbs the stairs, the Orbital Air sign and street barriers recede into the distance, shifting the perspective upward. The scene then opens onto an elevated plaza featuring palm trees in circular planters and a tiled surface. Finally, the camera walks across this open terrace, revealing a panoramic view of the dense, illuminated urban core spreading out below.
